testCases.title: Verify navigation to Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify search functionality for teams
steps: Verification: Expect search results to be displayed
expected: Search results related to 'New York Rangers' are displayed

testCases.title: Verify navigation to page 5 of the hockey table
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=5'
expected: Page 5 of the hockey table is displayed

testCases.title: Verify 'Next' pagination button
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=21'
expected: Navigates to the next page of hockey teams

testCases.title: Verify 'Previous' pagination button
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=19'
expected: Navigates to the previous page of hockey teams

testCases.title: Verify selecting 100 records per page
steps: Verification: Expect number of hockey teams displayed to be 100
expected: 100 hockey teams are displayed on the page
